stories.title: CI/CD Pipeline (GitHub Actions)
acceptanceCriteria: Lint job uses ruff to check Python code
Test job runs pytest with SQLite (no MySQL needed)
Test job sets SECRET_KEY and FERNET_KEY env vars
Docker build job verifies Dockerfile builds successfully
Workflow triggers on push to main and pull requests

stories.title: MEDIUM Security Fixes (6 items)
acceptanceCriteria: dashboard.js has safeUrl() helper for href attributes
All href insertions in dashboard.js use safeUrl()
manage.py guards debug mode with env check

stories.title: Production Deployment Documentation
acceptanceCriteria: Covers first-time setup with secrets generation commands
Covers flask db stamp head for existing databases
Covers Sandbox mode enablement (ENABLE_SANDBOX=true + build sandbox image)
Notes Fernet key migration for existing encrypted values

stories.title: docker-compose.prod.yml Sync
acceptanceCriteria: docker-compose.prod.yml worker has ENABLE_SANDBOX env var
docker-compose.prod.yml worker depends_on web with health check
docker-compose.prod.yml worker has DOCKER_HOST pointing to docker-proxy
